Hi George Armonza,

Your refund of $135.23 has been issued for your Crossplay account. The refund has begun processing and will be issued to your associated payment account within 24 hours.

We are apologize for the inconvenience and hope you continue using Crossplay. If the refund is stuck in processing or never arrives, please forward this email to support@crossplay.com.

 

Thank you,

Team Crossplay
